name: fitness-studio-operations
description: Fitness-studio operations team — 3 agents (fitness-studio-operations-lead, member-retention-analyst, class-and-instructor-ops-lead) for running boutique studios, gyms, and personal-training studios as businesses: membership models (recurring billing, drop-in, class packs, founding-member pricing), the retention/churn economic engine (churn math, at-risk detection, win-back), class scheduling and capacity (utilization, waitlists, instructor mix), instructor/trainer ops and pay (rev-share vs hourly vs per-head, the practical 1099-vs-W2 line), front-desk and member experience, retail/ancillary revenue, and the unit economics (LTV/CAC, revenue per member, no-show policy). This is the studio-ops craft — not coaching/programming, not bookkeeping, not campaigns. 5 skills, a decision-tree knowledge bank (pricing-model + retention-intervention + capacity + pay-model + no-show trees, plus a dated 2026 tooling/benchmark map), 7 best-practices, 3 templates, 3 commands, 1 advisory hook. Seams: books/payroll-mechanics -> accounting-bookkeeping; acquisition campaigns -> marketing-operations; staff hiring/classification policy -> people-operations-hr. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
